title: The Broken
description: Horror Modpack Adds Numerous Horror And Immersion Mechanics To The Game With Tech
body:
**EPILEPSY WARNING**


> ### Info
> This Modpack Is Made Off Of The Mod Named "The Broken Script" With Some Other Horror Mods And Shaders
> You Can Do Multplayer But The Broken Script May Not Work Right So I Would Just Do Singleplayer
> I Recommend At Least 6k Memory

> ### The Broken Start
> It Starts Out Normal And Slowly Gets More And More Scary So This Part Is Just Survival

> ### The Broken Midpoint
> The Horror Stuff Is Starting At This Point By This Point Its Best To Have Good Armor And I Like To Take Img's Of The Entitys And Other Weird Stuff With A Camera

> ### The Broken Ending
> Good Luck Getting Here
